mapper.select: select date(coalesce(actual_end_time, create_time)) as stats_date, cast(coalesce(sum(duration_seconds), 0) / 60 as signed) as value from study_timer_record where user_id = #{userId} and status = 'finished' and date(coalesce(actual_end_time, create_time)) between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by date(coalesce(actual_end_time, create_time)) order by stats_date asc

select date(coalesce(actual_end_time, create_time)) as stats_date, coalesce(sum(completed_pomodoro_count), 0) as value from study_timer_record where user_id = #{userId} and status = 'finished' and date(coalesce(actual_end_time, create_time)) between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by date(coalesce(actual_end_time, create_time)) order by stats_date asc

select dp.plan_date as stats_date, coalesce(sum(case when dpi.status = 1 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as completed_count, count(dpi.id) as total_count from daily_plan dp left join daily_plan_item dpi on dp.id = dpi.plan_id where dp.user_id = #{userId} and dp.plan_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by dp.plan_date order by dp.plan_date asc

select check_in_date as stats_date, coalesce(attempt_count, 0) as attempt_count, coalesce(latest_reason, '') as latest_reason, coalesce(plan_completed_count, 0) as plan_completed_count, coalesce(plan_total_count, 0) as plan_total_count, coalesce(study_duration_minutes, 0) as study_duration_minutes, last_attempt_time from check_in_fail_record where user_id = #{userId} and check_in_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate} order by check_in_date desc, last_attempt_time desc
